Healthcare Management System Documentation¶

Welcome to the Healthcare Management System documentation. This system manages doctors, patients, and their assignments based on diseases and departments.

  • Getting Started
    • Installation Steps
    • Complete Quick Setup
    • Project Structure
    • What You’ll Learn
  • Application Overview
    • Healthcare Management System
    • Running the Application
    • Disease-Department Mapping
    • Building Documentation
    • Development Workflow
    • Key Concepts
    • Learning Outcomes

Contents¶

  • Getting Started: Setup and installation instructions

  • Application: How to run and use the healthcare system

  • Departments: 4 departments (Cardiology, Orthopedics, Neurology, Pediatrics)

  • Doctors: 12 doctors across departments with different specializations

  • Patients: 50 patients with various diseases

  • Mapping: Automatic patient-to-doctor assignment based on disease

Quick Links¶

  • Project README

  • Source Code

Key Features¶

✓ Disease-based department assignment ✓ Automatic doctor assignment to patients ✓ 4 specialized departments ✓ 12 doctors with experience levels ✓ 50 patients with realistic data

Healthcare Management System
